title: Dutch Pudding Parfait
description: A rich and creamy dessert made with layers of dutch pudding, creamy sauce, and crunchy almond topping.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine Dutch pudding, sugar, and vanilla extract. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly.
In a separate saucepan, combine heavy cream, almond milk, and unsalted butter. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Pour the creamy sauce over the cooked Dutch pudding. Stir until well combined.
In a separate bowl, crush the almond slices into fine crumbs.
To assemble the parfait, layer the Dutch pudding mixture, almond crumbs, and fresh fruit in a glass or cup.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of creamy sauce on top.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
